div.class: topbar-wrapper d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 pb-3

i.class: fa fa-search position-absolute top-50 start-0 translate-middle-y ms-3 text-muted
fa fa-times position-absolute top-50 end-0 translate-middle-y me-3 text-muted cursor-pointer

div.class: card border-0 p-5 text-center mb-4 shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg accent-left-purple
div.p: You do not have any FedEx shipments logged yet. Configure your FedEx credentials to preview the dashboard.

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border font-size-xs px-2 py-1

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom

div.p: Track all FedEx shipments, filter by destination countries, and view delivery details.

input.placeholder: Search by Shipment Name, Customer, or Tracking #...

tr.td: No shipments match the selected criteria.

img.style: width: 28px; height: 28px; object-fit: cover; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.class: rounded-circle me-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center bg-light text-muted

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border px-2 py-1

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom

div.p: Estimate real-time shipping costs directly from the FedEx Rates Quote API.

div.class: chart-card p-4 border-0 shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg d-flex flex-column

t.p: No recent Sale Orders found with delivery addresses.

div.t-att-class: state.ratesInput.selected_order_id === order.id ? 'p-3 rounded border border-2 cursor-pointer' : 'p-3 rounded border border-light cursor-pointer'
div.t-att-style: state.ratesInput.selected_order_id === order.id ? 'cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #4D148C !important; background-color: #f6f0ff; border-color: #4D148C !important; transition: all 0.2s;' : 'cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #dee2e6 !important; background-color: white; transition: all 0.2s;'

div.class: card border-0 p-5 text-center shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center h-100
card border-0 p-4 shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg border-start-danger h-100
card border-0 p-4 shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg h-100

h5.class: fw-bold text-dark mb-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.class: service-icon-box bg-white p-2 rounded border text-center
div.style: width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.class: card border-0 p-5 text-center shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center h-100
div.p: Select a Sale Order from the list on the left to request live FedEx API rates.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom

div.p: View dimensions, packaging types, weights, and select options for your shipments.

div.class: card border-0 p-5 text-center shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center
div.p: There are no packaging configurations mapped to FedEx. Click 'Manage Package Types' to set them up.

div.class: chart-card p-4 h-100 position-relative border-0 shadow-sm bg-white
package-details-grid d-flex flex-column gap-2 border-top pt-3 mt-3
mt-4 pt-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom

div.p: View credentials, APIs, and account modes configured for your Odoo integration.

div.class: card border-0 p-5 text-center shadow-sm bg-white rounded-lg
div.p: There are no delivery methods configured for FedEx. Please configure a FedEx delivery method in your settings to show credential details here.

div.class: chart-card p-4 h-100 position-relative border-0 shadow-sm
mt-4 pt-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
